title: Easy way to find account ID
excerpt:
Hi there! 
I’m trying to find a way for users of the integration I’m developing to request insight into their data. I’d like them to contact me with their account ID, but I haven’t been able to find an easy way for users…

posts.author: KimBG (Kim van Stratum)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there!

I’m trying to find a way for users of the integration I’m developing to request insight into their data. I’d like them to contact me with their account ID, but I haven’t been able to find an easy way for users to find this information.
For example, for user ID or board ID it’s the digits in the URL when going to profile or a board.
Is there any place the Account ID is shown or do I have to refer them to the API playground to get it?

Thanks for your help!

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hallo Kim @KimBG

I don’t think there is an easy way for the end user to get to their accountId. Therefor I always use the accountUrl to identify an account.

posts.author: KimBG (Kim van Stratum)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks Bas! Sounds like the best option, in that case

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
